title: Kickxia scariosa

It is a member of the genus Kickxia, a group of small annual or biennial plants. The species Kickxia scariosa is further classified as a species within the plant kingdom, specifically belonging to the kingdom Plantae. Kickxia scariosa is a species of plant that is native to the Mediterranean region and parts of Europe. It is a relatively rare species, and more research is needed to fully understand its classification within the plant kingdom.
